creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
----- Forwarded message from Martin Etteldorf <etteldor@mail.be> -----

From: Martin Etteldorf <etteldor@mail.be>
Subject: Re: ports/121325: Xorg crashes when x11-wm/xcompmgr is running
Reply-To: Martin Etteldorf <etteldor@mail.be>
To: stefan@freebsd.org
Date: Tue, 16 Dec 2008 22:20:50 +0100 (CET)

Stefan,

> > > there hasn't been an update of your problem report ports/121325 [1] for
> > > quite a while. I'm trying to find out what the state of this is. Can you
> > > still reproduce the problem, or should this PR be closed?
> > 
> > I'll check as soon as I have the time to. It could take a few days though,
> > as I'm quite busy at the moment.
> 
> any news on this? Can the problem still be reproduced?

No, but that may have different reasons. I'm meanwhile running 7.1-PRERELEASE
with mostly up-to-date ports and my own compiled version of xcompmgr instead
of the one in the ports.


Kind regards,

Martin Etteldorf

Mail.be, WebMail and Virtual Office
http://www.mail.be

----- End forwarded message -----
